Name: Staff of Pain
Effect: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and gains, "{T}: This creature deals 1 damage to any target"; Equip {1}

Name: Fire Servant
Effect: When Fire Servant dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

Name: Fire Master
Effect: Tap: Fire Master deals 1 damage to any target.

Name: Cavern Drake
Effect: Flying; When Cavern Drake attacks, target creature you control gains flying.

Name: Fire Drake
Effect: Flying; When Fire Drake attacks it deals 1 damage to any target, then target creature you control gains Flying.

Name: Smokeweaver
Effect: Whenever a source would deal damage to a creature you control, prevent one of that damage.

Name: Immolation Deathshaman
Effect: Whenever a creature you control dies, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.

Name: Walk on Coals
Effect: At the beginning of your first main phase, add {R} and lose 1 life.

Name: Boil
Effect: Boil deals 1 damage to any target

Name: Immolate
Effect: Target creature gets +1/-1 until end of turn.

Name: Rockslide
Effect: Rockslide deals two damage to target creature without Flying

Name: Blaze
Effect: Blaze deals X damage to any target.

Name: Erupt
Effect: Erupt deals two damage to all creatures without flying

Name: Read the Scars
Effect: At the beginning of your next upkeep, draw cards equal to the number of creatures that died since you cast this spell.

Name: Incinerate
Effect: Incinerate deals two damage to any target. If Incinerate targets a creature, that creature cannot regenerate this turn. If Incinerate targets a player, that player cannot gain life for the rest of the game.
